message:
feat(btrfs,core,mvcc): add COW tree mutation API, tracing diagnostics, and snapshot registry

ffs-btrfs: Implement in-memory COW B-tree mutation interface (BtrfsBTree trait)
with insert/delete/update/range operations backed by a BTreeMap node store.
Add BtrfsMutationError, BtrfsCowNode model, and InMemoryBtrfs with configurable
leaf fanout and COW-on-write semantics. Parse compression fields in extent data.

ffs-core: Add structured tracing spans throughout the btrfs read path -- chunk
mapping failures log logical address and parse error, physical I/O errors are
traced with the target offset, and read operations emit start/complete spans
with inode, offset, duration, and byte counts via Instant-based latency tracking.

ffs-mvcc: Add SnapshotRegistry -- standalone thread-safe (RwLock) snapshot
lifecycle manager decoupled from MvccStore so FUSE handlers can acquire/release
snapshots without holding the version-store lock. Includes RAII SnapshotHandle
with Drop auto-release, monotonic counters, watermark stall detection, and full
tracing instrumentation. Existing inline methods gain tracing and doc notes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
